# Add CMake-only content below the preserve marker at the end of this file.    #
#                                                                              #
# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_genrule(
  NAME
    op_table_gen
  SRCS
    "generate_vm_isa.py"
    "isa.json"
  OUTS
    op_table.h
  CMD
    "python3 $(rootpath generate_vm_isa.py) --schema $(rootpath isa.json) --op-table $(execpath op_table.h)"
)

iree_genrule(
  NAME
    encoding_table_gen
  SRCS
    "generate_vm_isa.py"
    "isa.json"
  OUTS
    encoding_table.c
    encoding_table.h
  CMD
    "python3 $(rootpath generate_vm_isa.py) --schema $(rootpath isa.json) --encoding-table-source $(execpath encoding_table.c) --encoding-table-header $(execpath encoding_table.h)"
)

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    isa
  HDRS
    "encoding_table.h"
    "isa.h"
    "op_table.h"
  SRCS
    "encoding_table.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::flatcc::parsing
    iree::schemas::bytecode_module_def_c_fbs
    iree::vm
  PUBLIC
)

iree_cc_test(
  NAME
    isa_test
  SRCS
    "isa_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::isa
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

# encoding_table.c includes isa.h, and isa.h includes the generated op_table.h.
# The generated encoding_table.c source gives CMake an edge to
# encoding_table_gen, but it does not infer the include-time dependency on
# op_table_gen before the first compile in a clean tree. Make that order-only
# dependency explicit so parallel CI builds cannot compile encoding_table.c
# before op_table.h exists.
add_dependencies(iree_vm_bytecode_isa_isa.objects
  op_table_gen
)
